task_description_es: Crea una ilustración conceptual que explique el principio de superposición en circuitos eléctricos, mostrando cómo se analiza un circuito con múltiples fuentes desactivando una a la vez. Debe ser clara para estudiantes de ingeniería de segundo semestre.
task_description_en: Create a conceptual illustration explaining the superposition principle in electrical circuits, showing how to analyze a circuit with multiple sources by deactivating them one at a time. Should be clear for second-semester engineering students.

classification.reasoning: Abstract conceptual content requiring visual metaphors; not a realistic photo, not a standard schematic diagram, not a flowchart

config_rationale.model_choice: flash is sufficient for conceptual illustrations without heavy text rendering requirements
config_rationale.thinking_choice: Conceptual illustrations don't require extended reasoning; standard generation is appropriate
config_rationale.aspect_ratio_choice: 16:9 is ideal for classroom projection and modern university screens; fits typical presentation dimensions
config_rationale.size_choice: 1K resolution is adequate for web viewing, classroom projection, and course materials; cost-effective at ~$0.07 per image
config_rationale.search_choice: false because illustration is conceptual, not based on real-world photographic references

enrichment_directives: Clear visual metaphor for understanding superposition principle
Minimal text overlay (let image speak visually)
No excessive detail, no cartoonish style
